---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     PAGE BANNER
════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.column-screen .gradient-banner}
::: {.container .header-container}

# Projects
### Applied work at the intersection of quantitative modeling, AI assurance, and data engineering

:::
:::

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     FILTER BAR
════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.projects-filter-bar}
<div id="filter-bar">
  <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="ai-assurance">AI Assurance</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="quant">Quantitative</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="data-eng">Data Engineering</button>
  <button class="filter-btn" data-filter="viz">Visualization</button>
</div>
:::

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     PROJECT GRID (rendered by JS)
════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="projects-grid" class="projects-grid"></div>

<div id="no-results" class="no-results" style="display:none;">
  No projects match this filter yet — check back soon.
</div>

---

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     DATA + RENDERING SCRIPT
     ─────────────────────────────────────────
     TO ADD A NEW PROJECT: copy one object in
     the PROJECTS array below and fill it in.
     Tags must match a filter-btn data-filter
     value (or add a new button + value).
════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<script>
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// PROJECT DATA  ← Edit here to add / update projects
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const PROJECTS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Automated ETL Pipeline & Alpha Signal Factory",
    subtitle: "Central China Securities",
    tags: ["data-eng", "quant"],
    tagLabels: ["Data Engineering", "Quantitative"],
    status: "completed",          // "completed" | "in-progress" | "research"
    year: "2023",
    summary: "Architected an end-to-end ETL pipeline processing 100K+ daily financial entries with rigorous outlier detection, powering 10+ multi-factor alpha signals for equity research.",
    highlights: [
      "100K+ daily records processed with sub-minute latency",
      "10+ multi-factor alpha signals with automated validation",
      "Outlier detection pipeline reducing data errors by ~40%",
      "Built with Python, Pandas, NumPy, and SQL"
    ],
    tech: ["Python", "Pandas", "NumPy", "SQL", "ETL"],
    links: {
      github: "https://github.com/hy86652",
      demo: null,
      paper: null
    },
    diagram: "etl"
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "Markov Chain Monte Carlo Risk Modeler",
    subtitle: "Cornell University — Stochastic Modeling",
    tags: ["quant", "ai-assurance"],
    tagLabels: ["Quantitative", "AI Assurance"],
    status: "in-progress",
    year: "2024–Present",
    summary: "Applying Markov Chains and Monte Carlo Simulations to model regime-switching behavior in financial time series, translating probabilistic uncertainty into interpretable risk metrics.",
    highlights: [
      "Regime-switching detection across multi-asset time series",
      "Monte Carlo confidence intervals for portfolio risk estimates",
      "Transparent, auditable model outputs for non-technical stakeholders",
      "Built with R (Tidyverse) and Python (Scikit-learn)"
    ],
    tech: ["R", "Python", "Markov Chains", "Monte Carlo", "Statistics"],
    links: {
      github: "https://github.com/hy86652",
      demo: null,
      paper: null
    },
    diagram: null
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "Geospatial Inequality Dashboard",
    subtitle: "Cornell Information Science",
    tags: ["viz", "data-eng"],
    tagLabels: ["Visualization", "Data Engineering"],
    status: "completed",
    year: "2024",
    summary: "Interactive choropleth dashboard visualizing socioeconomic indicators across US counties using Mapbox GL and Leaflet APIs, enabling exploratory spatial analysis for policy researchers.",
    highlights: [
      "County-level choropleth with dynamic variable switching",
      "Custom Mapbox tileset pipeline for fast tile rendering",
      "Linked charts: map click updates time-series panel",
      "Fully browser-side — no backend required"
    ],
    tech: ["Mapbox", "Leaflet", "JavaScript", "Tableau", "GIS"],
    links: {
      github: "https://github.com/hy86652",
      demo: null,
      paper: null
    },
    diagram: null
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "AI Assurance Framework Prototype",
    subtitle: "Cornell MPS Capstone — In Progress",
    tags: ["ai-assurance"],
    tagLabels: ["AI Assurance"],
    status: "research",
    year: "2025",
    summary: "Designing an auditable ML model evaluation framework that surfaces reliability metrics, bias diagnostics, and explainability reports — bridging the gap between model performance and business trust.",
    highlights: [
      "Automated bias and fairness diagnostic reports",
      "Model card generation for internal audit trails",
      "Scikit-learn pipeline integration with zero-config setup",
      "Research stage — architecture and spec in progress"
    ],
    tech: ["Python", "Scikit-learn", "ML Fairness", "Model Cards", "AI Safety"],
    links: {
      github: null,
      demo: null,
      paper: null
    },
    diagram: null
  }
];

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// STATUS CONFIG
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const STATUS_CONFIG = {
  "completed":   { label: "Completed",   color: "#276749", bg: "#f0fff4", border: "#9ae6b4" },
  "in-progress": { label: "In Progress", color: "#744210", bg: "#fffbeb", border: "#f6ad55" },
  "research":    { label: "Research",    color: "#2c5282", bg: "#ebf8ff", border: "#90cdf4" }
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// RENDER
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderProjects(filter = "all") {
  const grid = document.getElementById("projects-grid");
  const noResults = document.getElementById("no-results");
  const filtered = filter === "all"
    ? PROJECTS
    : PROJECTS.filter(p => p.tags.includes(filter));

  noResults.style.display = filtered.length === 0 ? "block" : "none";

  grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(p => {
    const st = STATUS_CONFIG[p.status] || STATUS_CONFIG["completed"];
    const techPills = p.tech.map(t =>
      `<span class="tech-pill">${t}</span>`
    ).join("");
    const highlights = p.highlights.map(h =>
      `<li>${h}</li>`
    ).join("");
    const tagBadges = p.tagLabels.map(l =>
      `<span class="tag-badge">${l}</span>`
    ).join("");

    const links = [];
    if (p.links.github) links.push(`<a href="${p.links.github}" target="_blank" class="proj-link">GitHub →</a>`);
    if (p.links.demo)   links.push(`<a href="${p.links.demo}"   target="_blank" class="proj-link proj-link--demo">Live Demo →</a>`);
    if (p.links.paper)  links.push(`<a href="${p.links.paper}"  target="_blank" class="proj-link">Paper →</a>`);
    const linksHtml = links.length
      ? `<div class="proj-links">${links.join("")}</div>`
      : `<div class="proj-links"><span class="proj-link-na">Links coming soon</span></div>`;

    return `
    <div class="proj-card" data-tags="${p.tags.join(" ")}">
      <div class="proj-card-header">
        <div class="proj-meta-row">
          <span class="proj-year">${p.year}</span>
          <span class="proj-status" style="
            color:${st.color};
            background:${st.bg};
            border-color:${st.border}
          ">${st.label}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-tags">${tagBadges}</div>
        <h3 class="proj-title">${p.title}</h3>
        <p class="proj-subtitle">${p.subtitle}</p>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card-body">
        <p class="proj-summary">${p.summary}</p>
        <ul class="proj-highlights">${highlights}</ul>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-card-footer">
        <div class="proj-tech">${techPills}</div>
        ${linksHtml}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join("");
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// FILTER INTERACTION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  renderProjects("all");

  document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
      btn.classList.add("active");
      renderProjects(btn.dataset.filter);
    });
  });
});
</script>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     PROJECTS PAGE STYLES
════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Filter Bar ────────────────────────────── */
.projects-filter-bar {
  padding: 1.5rem 0 0.5rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
}

#filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
}

.filter-btn {
  padding: 0.4rem 1.1rem;
  border: 1.5px solid #1a365d;
  background: white;
  color: #1a365d;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
}

.filter-btn:hover {
  background: #ebf4ff;
}

.filter-btn.active {
  background: #1a365d;
  color: white;
}

/* ── Grid ───────────────────────────────────── */
.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
  padding: 2rem 0;
}

/* ── Project Card ───────────────────────────── */
.proj-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.proj-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(26, 54, 93, 0.13);
  border-color: #bee3f8;
}

.proj-card-header {
  padding: 1.4rem 1.4rem 0.8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f4f8;
  background: #f7fafc;
}

.proj-meta-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.proj-year {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #718096;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.proj-status {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.proj-tags {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
}

.tag-badge {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #2b6cb0;
  background: #ebf8ff;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.proj-title {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a365d;
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.proj-subtitle {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #718096;
  margin: 0;
  font-style: italic;
}

.proj-card-body {
  padding: 1rem 1.4rem;
  flex: 1;
}

.proj-summary {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.proj-highlights {
  padding-left: 1.1rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.proj-highlights li {
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  padding: 0.22rem 0;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.proj-highlights li::marker {
  color: #f6ad55;
}

.proj-card-footer {
  padding: 0.9rem 1.4rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #f0f4f8;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.proj-tech {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

.tech-pill {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  background: #1a365d;
  color: #ffffff;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.proj-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.proj-link {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #2b6cb0;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: color 0.15s;
}

.proj-link:hover { color: #f6ad55; }

.proj-link--demo {
  background: #f6ad55;
  color: #1a365d !important;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.proj-link-na {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #a0aec0;
  font-style: italic;
}

/* ── No Results ─────────────────────────────── */
.no-results {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 3rem;
  color: #a0aec0;
  font-style: italic;
}

/* ── Responsive ─────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .projects-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .proj-card-footer {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
}
</style>
```
